pilotRole: Prove dense tropical foliage and warm wood can feel abundant without obscuring board state.

identity.biome: Abundant coconut palms, fruit structures, hanging platforms, drums, and communal shade

restorationChange: Locked baskets open, drum rhythms reconnect, and new blossoms appear across the canopy.

landmarks.visual: Woven coconut-husk cradles suspended under a protective palm canopy.
Layered drum platforms beneath palms with clear shared rhythm motifs.
Pulley baskets and transparent shell counters for visible exchange games.
Ancient exposed roots sheltering shell season records and a listening seat.

boss.name: Tamba
boss.visual: Powerful crowned palm guardian with fruit-vault armor and a protective, readable silhouette.

arena.name: Tamba's Crown Palm
arena.visual: Giant living palm vault with opening fruit baskets and a shared feast dais.
